SEARCH
Package com.berryrock.integrationhub.model

Class SheetBatchUpdateRequest

java.lang.Object
com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.SheetBatchUpdateRequest
public class SheetBatchUpdateRequest extends Object
Describes the cell values to write back into a single Google Sheet row. Part of the address pipeline write-back phase — one instance is created per Loan Tape row that was successfully matched to a Salesforce record. A list of these is passed to GoogleSheetsClient.batchUpdateAddressMatches(java.lang.String, java.lang.String, java.util.List<com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.SheetBatchUpdateRequest>) which translates each request into a Sheets API ValueRange and submits them in a single batch call. Fields that remain null are skipped during the batch update so that pre-existing column values are not overwritten.
